name: the-art-of-manifesting
description: Carolyn Boyes' 'The Art of Manifesting: Tap into the power of the universe to create change' — a concise guide to manifesting through intention, imagination, relaxation, commitment, belief, and habit. Draws on spiritual traditions from around the world to teach a practical 8-step method for creating deliberate change in your life.
useCase: Learning to manifest desires, developing a manifesting practice, understanding the power of intention and imagination, releasing limiting beliefs, and creating lasting change.
knownRisks: Very short book — may feel too brief for some readers
Manifesting concepts may not resonate with skeptics
